---
title: "Data Collection Report"
params:
  collection_id: NA
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
```

## Collection Summary

```{r summary}
if (file.exists("collection_summary.csv")) {
  sum <- read.csv("collection_summary.csv")
  knitr::kable(sum, col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
}
```

## Source Distribution

```{r source}
if (file.exists("source_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("source_dist.png")
}
```

## File Size Distribution

```{r filesize}
if (file.exists("file_size_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("file_size_dist.png")
}
```

## Format Distribution

```{r format}
if (file.exists("format_dist.png")) {
  knitr::include_graphics("format_dist.png")
}
```

## Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
